name: github
description: Connect Artyx to GitHub MCP for repository reading, issue and pull request triage, and CI status inspection using a personal access token.

interface.shortDescription: Read repos, triage issues and PRs, inspect CI.
interface.longDescription: Connect the agent to GitHub over MCP: browse repositories, triage issues and pull requests, and inspect CI status with a personal access token you supply.
defaultPrompt: Triage the open pull requests on a repository and summarize what needs review.

companion.title: GitHub token
companion.summary: Create a GitHub personal access token and provide it as GITHUB_TOKEN when prompted.
steps: Create a GitHub personal access token with the repository access needed for your workflow.
Paste the token into Artyx when prompted for GITHUB_TOKEN.
